TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Laho_Ali, title = Laho_Ali, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Laho_Ali} }

S.FORM: == Sowal no Pangcah == Tadafa'inayan mico'a'angay to Ripon no ponon a finacadan ci Laho. Cifafahi ci Alian ci Laho, ikoray to tamdamdaw pangangan hanto ci Laho Ali han to cingra. Tada makadofah ko kinaira no Taywan, adihay ko rakes ato sikitang. Pakayni tona kinaira ko ceng-fo no Ripon , caay pitolas talalotok a mipamatang, mipenec to ka'oripan no Yincomin. Itiya i adihay ko painian no Ripon a ceng-fo to sapikowan to Yincomin a lekakawa, onini a lekakawa malasaka falic to ko pinangan to saki'orip no Yincomin, malasaka tongal ko pico'aang no Yincomin to ceng-fo no Ripon. Mi'adop ta ira ko saka'orip no tamdamdaw itiya ho, nika o Ripon han papipasadak to kowang nangra. Wata ko firang no Ponon a tamdaw. Wata ko keter no sakakaay ni Laho Ali, pakayni tonian aca macacoli ato imeng, rofo han to no imeng. Tangasa kasadakan nira i, ladoka'ay saan ko tatirengan, caho katenes mapatay to. Matenesa to mapenec no Ripon a ceng-fo ko finacadan, ikor to caay to pakahadidi cangra, misafaloco' to mico'a'ang to ceng-fo no Ripon. Sahonihoni han nangra mirawraw, mikoliniw mikari'ang to imeng no Ripon. Ma'esamen to ko ceng-fo no Ripon, patarod sa to sakalali'ay cangra, mitahidang pasaopo to finacadan no niyaro'. Salipahak sa tayra ko finacadan a mapolong, nika nengneng han ko tamdaw no Ripon awaay ko sakali'ayan a faloco'. Oya tayraay a finacadan haen sato maemin mapatay to no Ripon.Hatiniay to katenes ko kalala'is ato kasasi'ingtel malasaka cifaloco' ni Laho Ali mico'a'ang to ceng-fo no Ripon. Mikerid to to finacadan malinah tayra to takaraway maraayay a pala ci Daho Ali. Takaraw kacalemceman a pala itira, caayay to kalahoday a mingata ko tamdaw no Ripon. Caayay pakarepet ci Daho Alian ko Ripon, maohot to cangra, o pico'a'ang no finacadan malasaka sa'et to ko pisalalan a tatayalen nangra. Mato pinapinaay to a miheca ko pico'a'ang no Ponon, doedo sato to karakat no lalan, mafana' to ci Laho Ali, ano tongoden ho ko pico'a'ang, caay ko sakanga'ay no finacadan a parayray. Wata to ko kari'ang no Ripon, misalongoc to ci Laho Alian a mili'ay, minanay mapaherek to ko pinapinaay to a miheca ko kalala'is. 1933 a miheca malali'ay to ko Ripon ato ci Laho Alian, mapaherek to ko pinapinaay kalala'is. Patahekal to cingra to salongoc, to sakanga'ay no finacadan, caay to paco'ay ko Ripon, safangcal sato ko nika'orip. Mapangangan to no finacadan ci Laho Ali o macodahay mico'a'angay to Ripon. Doedo sa to codah no faloco' ato fenek cingra, mikerid to finacadan a midipang to serangawan no finacadan ato sakingodo. Kuwaping a sowal
S.PHON: == so~uwa删 no~u pa艐师a魔 == ta涩~僧afa省inajan mi师o~u省a省a艐aj to~u ripo~un no~u po~uno~un a fina师a涩~僧an 师i 删a魔o~u. 师ifafa魔i 师i a删ian 师i 删a魔o~u, iko~uraj to~u tam涩~僧am涩~僧aw pa艐a艐an 魔anto~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删i 魔an to~u 师i艐ra. ta涩~僧a maka涩~僧o~ufa魔 ko~u kinaira no~u tajwan, a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u rak蓹s ato~u sikita艐. pakajni to~una kinaira ko~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un , 师aaj pito~u删as ta删a删o~uto~uk a mipamata艐, mip蓹n蓹师 to~u ka省o~uripan no~u jin师o~umin. itija i a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u painian no~u ripo~un a 师蓹艐-fo~u to~u sapiko~uwan to~u jin师o~umin a 删蓹kakawa, o~unini a 删蓹kakawa ma删asaka fa删i师 to~u ko~u pina艐an to~u saki省o~urip no~u jin师o~umin, ma删asaka to~u艐a删 ko~u pi师o~u省aa艐 no~u jin师o~umin to~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un. mi省a涩~僧o~up ta ira ko~u saka省o~urip no~u tam涩~僧am涩~僧aw itija 魔o~u, nika o~u ripo~un 魔an papipasa涩~僧ak to~u ko~uwa艐 na艐ra. wata ko~u fira艐 no~u po~uno~un a tam涩~僧aw. wata ko~u k蓹t蓹r no~u sakakaaj ni 删a魔o~u a删i, pakajni to~unian a师a ma师a师o~u删i ato~u im蓹艐, ro~ufo~u 魔an to~u no~u im蓹艐. ta艐asa kasa涩~僧akan nira i, 删a涩~僧o~uka省aj saan ko~u tatir蓹艐an, 师a魔o~u kat蓹n蓹s mapataj to~u. mat蓹n蓹sa to~u map蓹n蓹师 no~u ripo~un a 师蓹艐-fo~u ko~u fina师a涩~僧an, iko~ur to~u 师aaj to~u paka魔a涩~僧i涩~僧i 师a艐ra, misafa删o~u师o~u省 to~u mi师o~u省a省a艐 to~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un. sa魔o~uni魔o~uni 魔an na艐ra mirawraw, miko~u删iniw mikari省a艐 to~u im蓹艐 no~u ripo~un. ma省蓹sam蓹n to~u ko~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un, pataro~u涩~僧 sa to~u saka删a删i省aj 师a艐ra, mita魔i涩~僧a艐 pasao~upo~u to~u fina师a涩~僧an no~u nijaro~u省. sa删ipa魔ak sa tajra ko~u fina师a涩~僧an a mapo~u删o~u艐, nika n蓹艐n蓹艐 魔an ko~u tam涩~僧aw no~u ripo~un awaaj ko~u saka删i省ajan a fa删o~u师o~u省. o~uja tajraaj a fina师a涩~僧an 魔a蓹n sato~u ma蓹min mapataj to~u no~u ripo~un.魔atiniaj to~u kat蓹n蓹s ko~u ka删a删a省is ato~u kasasi省i艐t蓹删 ma删asaka 师ifa删o~u师o~u省 ni 删a魔o~u a删i mi师o~u省a省a艐 to~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un. mik蓹ri涩~僧 to~u to~u fina师a涩~僧an ma删ina魔 tajra to~u takarawaj maraajaj a pa删a 师i 涩~僧a魔o~u a删i. takaraw ka师a删蓹m师蓹man a pa删a itira, 师aajaj to~u ka删a魔o~u涩~僧aj a mi艐ata ko~u tam涩~僧aw no~u ripo~un. 师aajaj pakar蓹p蓹t 师i 涩~僧a魔o~u a删ian ko~u ripo~un, mao~u魔o~ut to~u 师a艐ra, o~u pi师o~u省a省a艐 no~u fina师a涩~僧an ma删asaka sa省蓹t to~u ko~u pisa删a删an a tataja删蓹n na艐ra. mato~u pinapinaaj to~u a mi魔蓹师a ko~u pi师o~u省a省a艐 no~u po~uno~un, 涩~僧o~u蓹涩~僧o~u sato~u to~u karakat no~u 删a删an, mafana省 to~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删i, ano~u to~u艐o~u涩~僧蓹n 魔o~u ko~u pi师o~u省a省a艐, 师aaj ko~u saka艐a省aj no~u fina师a涩~僧an a parajraj. wata to~u ko~u kari省a艐 no~u ripo~un, misa删o~u艐o~u师 to~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删ian a mi删i省aj, minanaj mapa魔蓹r蓹k to~u ko~u pinapinaaj to~u a mi魔蓹师a ko~u ka删a删a省is. **** a mi魔蓹师a ma删a删i省aj to~u ko~u ripo~un ato~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删ian, mapa魔蓹r蓹k to~u ko~u pinapinaaj ka删a删a省is. pata魔蓹ka删 to~u 师i艐ra to~u sa删o~u艐o~u师, to~u saka艐a省aj no~u fina师a涩~僧an, 师aaj to~u pa师o~u省aj ko~u ripo~un, safa艐师a删 sato~u ko~u nika省o~urip. mapa艐a艐an to~u no~u fina师a涩~僧an 师i 删a魔o~u a删i o~u ma师o~u涩~僧a魔aj mi师o~u省a省a艐aj to~u ripo~un. 涩~僧o~u蓹涩~僧o~u sa to~u 师o~u涩~僧a魔 no~u fa删o~u师o~u省 ato~u f蓹n蓹k 师i艐ra, mik蓹ri涩~僧 to~u fina师a涩~僧an a mi涩~僧ipa艐 to~u s蓹ra艐awan no~u fina师a涩~僧an ato~u saki艐o~u涩~僧o~u. ko~u~uwapi艐 a so~uwa删
S.FORM: == Sowal no Pangcah == Tadafa'inayan mico'a'angay to Ripon no ponon a finacadan ci Laho. Cifafahi ci Alian ci Laho, ikoray to tamdamdaw pangangan hanto ci Laho Ali han to cingra. Tada makadofah ko kinaira no Taywan, adihay ko rakes ato sikitang. Pakayni tona kinaira ko ceng-fo no Ripon , caay pitolas talalotok a mipamatang, mipenec to ka'oripan no Yincomin. Itiya i adihay ko painian no Ripon a ceng-fo to sapikowan to Yincomin a lekakawa, onini a lekakawa malasaka falic to ko pinangan to saki'orip no Yincomin, malasaka tongal ko pico'aang no Yincomin to ceng-fo no Ripon. Mi'adop ta ira ko saka'orip no tamdamdaw itiya ho, nika o Ripon han papipasadak to kowang nangra. Wata ko firang no Ponon a tamdaw. Wata ko keter no sakakaay ni Laho Ali, pakayni tonian aca macacoli ato imeng, rofo han to no imeng. Tangasa kasadakan nira i, ladoka'ay saan ko tatirengan, caho katenes mapatay to. Matenesa to mapenec no Ripon a ceng-fo ko finacadan, ikor to caay to pakahadidi cangra, misafaloco' to mico'a'ang to ceng-fo no Ripon. Sahonihoni han nangra mirawraw, mikoliniw mikari'ang to imeng no Ripon. Ma'esamen to ko ceng-fo no Ripon, patarod sa to sakalali'ay cangra, mitahidang pasaopo to finacadan no niyaro'. Salipahak sa tayra ko finacadan a mapolong, nika nengneng han ko tamdaw no Ripon awaay ko sakali'ayan a faloco'. Oya tayraay a finacadan haen sato maemin mapatay to no Ripon.Hatiniay to katenes ko kalala'is ato kasasi'ingtel malasaka cifaloco' ni Laho Ali mico'a'ang to ceng-fo no Ripon. Mikerid to to finacadan malinah tayra to takaraway maraayay a pala ci Daho Ali. Takaraw kacalemceman a pala itira, caayay to kalahoday a mingata ko tamdaw no Ripon. Caayay pakarepet ci Daho Alian ko Ripon, maohot to cangra, o pico'a'ang no finacadan malasaka sa'et to ko pisalalan a tatayalen nangra. Mato pinapinaay to a miheca ko pico'a'ang no Ponon, doedo sato to karakat no lalan, mafana' to ci Laho Ali, ano tongoden ho ko pico'a'ang, caay ko sakanga'ay no finacadan a parayray. Wata to ko kari'ang no Ripon, misalongoc to ci Laho Alian a mili'ay, minanay mapaherek to ko pinapinaay to a miheca ko kalala'is. 1933 a miheca malali'ay to ko Ripon ato ci Laho Alian, mapaherek to ko pinapinaay kalala'is. Patahekal to cingra to salongoc, to sakanga'ay no finacadan, caay to paco'ay ko Ripon, safangcal sato ko nika'orip. Mapangangan to no finacadan ci Laho Ali o macodahay mico'a'angay to Ripon. Doedo sa to codah no faloco' ato fenek cingra, mikerid to finacadan a midipang to serangawan no finacadan ato sakingodo. Kuwaping a sowal
S.PHON: == so~uwa删 no~u pa艐师a魔 == ta涩~僧afa省inajan mi师o~u省a省a艐aj to~u ripo~un no~u po~uno~un a fina师a涩~僧an 师i 删a魔o~u. 师ifafa魔i 师i a删ian 师i 删a魔o~u, iko~uraj to~u tam涩~僧am涩~僧aw pa艐a艐an 魔anto~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删i 魔an to~u 师i艐ra. ta涩~僧a maka涩~僧o~ufa魔 ko~u kinaira no~u tajwan, a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u rak蓹s ato~u sikita艐. pakajni to~una kinaira ko~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un , 师aaj pito~u删as ta删a删o~uto~uk a mipamata艐, mip蓹n蓹师 to~u ka省o~uripan no~u jin师o~umin. itija i a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u painian no~u ripo~un a 师蓹艐-fo~u to~u sapiko~uwan to~u jin师o~umin a 删蓹kakawa, o~unini a 删蓹kakawa ma删asaka fa删i师 to~u ko~u pina艐an to~u saki省o~urip no~u jin师o~umin, ma删asaka to~u艐a删 ko~u pi师o~u省aa艐 no~u jin师o~umin to~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un. mi省a涩~僧o~up ta ira ko~u saka省o~urip no~u tam涩~僧am涩~僧aw itija 魔o~u, nika o~u ripo~un 魔an papipasa涩~僧ak to~u ko~uwa艐 na艐ra. wata ko~u fira艐 no~u po~uno~un a tam涩~僧aw. wata ko~u k蓹t蓹r no~u sakakaaj ni 删a魔o~u a删i, pakajni to~unian a师a ma师a师o~u删i ato~u im蓹艐, ro~ufo~u 魔an to~u no~u im蓹艐. ta艐asa kasa涩~僧akan nira i, 删a涩~僧o~uka省aj saan ko~u tatir蓹艐an, 师a魔o~u kat蓹n蓹s mapataj to~u. mat蓹n蓹sa to~u map蓹n蓹师 no~u ripo~un a 师蓹艐-fo~u ko~u fina师a涩~僧an, iko~ur to~u 师aaj to~u paka魔a涩~僧i涩~僧i 师a艐ra, misafa删o~u师o~u省 to~u mi师o~u省a省a艐 to~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un. sa魔o~uni魔o~uni 魔an na艐ra mirawraw, miko~u删iniw mikari省a艐 to~u im蓹艐 no~u ripo~un. ma省蓹sam蓹n to~u ko~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un, pataro~u涩~僧 sa to~u saka删a删i省aj 师a艐ra, mita魔i涩~僧a艐 pasao~upo~u to~u fina师a涩~僧an no~u nijaro~u省. sa删ipa魔ak sa tajra ko~u fina师a涩~僧an a mapo~u删o~u艐, nika n蓹艐n蓹艐 魔an ko~u tam涩~僧aw no~u ripo~un awaaj ko~u saka删i省ajan a fa删o~u师o~u省. o~uja tajraaj a fina师a涩~僧an 魔a蓹n sato~u ma蓹min mapataj to~u no~u ripo~un.魔atiniaj to~u kat蓹n蓹s ko~u ka删a删a省is ato~u kasasi省i艐t蓹删 ma删asaka 师ifa删o~u师o~u省 ni 删a魔o~u a删i mi师o~u省a省a艐 to~u 师蓹艐-fo~u no~u ripo~un. mik蓹ri涩~僧 to~u to~u fina师a涩~僧an ma删ina魔 tajra to~u takarawaj maraajaj a pa删a 师i 涩~僧a魔o~u a删i. takaraw ka师a删蓹m师蓹man a pa删a itira, 师aajaj to~u ka删a魔o~u涩~僧aj a mi艐ata ko~u tam涩~僧aw no~u ripo~un. 师aajaj pakar蓹p蓹t 师i 涩~僧a魔o~u a删ian ko~u ripo~un, mao~u魔o~ut to~u 师a艐ra, o~u pi师o~u省a省a艐 no~u fina师a涩~僧an ma删asaka sa省蓹t to~u ko~u pisa删a删an a tataja删蓹n na艐ra. mato~u pinapinaaj to~u a mi魔蓹师a ko~u pi师o~u省a省a艐 no~u po~uno~un, 涩~僧o~u蓹涩~僧o~u sato~u to~u karakat no~u 删a删an, mafana省 to~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删i, ano~u to~u艐o~u涩~僧蓹n 魔o~u ko~u pi师o~u省a省a艐, 师aaj ko~u saka艐a省aj no~u fina师a涩~僧an a parajraj. wata to~u ko~u kari省a艐 no~u ripo~un, misa删o~u艐o~u师 to~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删ian a mi删i省aj, minanaj mapa魔蓹r蓹k to~u ko~u pinapinaaj to~u a mi魔蓹师a ko~u ka删a删a省is. **** a mi魔蓹师a ma删a删i省aj to~u ko~u ripo~un ato~u 师i 删a魔o~u a删ian, mapa魔蓹r蓹k to~u ko~u pinapinaaj ka删a删a省is. pata魔蓹ka删 to~u 师i艐ra to~u sa删o~u艐o~u师, to~u saka艐a省aj no~u fina师a涩~僧an, 师aaj to~u pa师o~u省aj ko~u ripo~un, safa艐师a删 sato~u ko~u nika省o~urip. mapa艐a艐an to~u no~u fina师a涩~僧an 师i 删a魔o~u a删i o~u ma师o~u涩~僧a魔aj mi师o~u省a省a艐aj to~u ripo~un. 涩~僧o~u蓹涩~僧o~u sa to~u 师o~u涩~僧a魔 no~u fa删o~u师o~u省 ato~u f蓹n蓹k 师i艐ra, mik蓹ri涩~僧 to~u fina师a涩~僧an a mi涩~僧ipa艐 to~u s蓹ra艐awan no~u fina师a涩~僧an ato~u saki艐o~u涩~僧o~u. ko~u~uwapi艐 a so~uwa删
